page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.gn5-c8g1.8xlarge is a GPU-accelerated virtual machine instance belonging to the ecs.gn5 family. It is powered by an x86_64 architecture featuring 32 dedicated physical cores with 32 vCPUs, operating with a single thread per core configuration. The instance is equipped with 240.0 GB of system memory, providing a ratio of 7.5 GB of RAM per core.

This instance integrates hardware acceleration through four NVIDIA P100 GPUs, delivering a combined total of 64 GB of VRAM. For local data storage, the server includes a bundled 1889 GB SSD. Network connectivity is supported by a baseline bandwidth of 10 Gbps. The underlying virtualization is managed via the KVM hypervisor.

Given the presence of four dedicated GPUs and local SSD storage, the ecs.gn5-c8g1.8xlarge is designed for parallel processing workloads. It is suitable for deep learning training, GPU-accelerated database queries, scientific simulations, and video transcoding. The dedicated CPU allocation and high-density GPU configuration offer a balanced resource profile for multi-GPU workloads, though the lack of hyperthreading means each vCPU corresponds directly to a physical core, ensuring predictable compute performance.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.gn5-c8g1.8xlarge is a GPU-accelerated instance from the ecs.gn5 family, built on the x86_64 architecture. It features 32 dedicated physical cores and 32 vCPUs with a single thread per core, paired with 240.0 GB of system memory. The server is equipped with four NVIDIA P100 GPUs, providing a total of 64 GB of VRAM, alongside a bundled 1889 GB local SSD for high-speed storage. Operating on the KVM hypervisor, the instance delivers a baseline network bandwidth of 10 Gbps. This hardware configuration is optimized for parallel computing tasks, making it highly suitable for deep learning, scientific computing, and GPU-intensive rendering workloads. The dedicated CPU allocation ensures stable, predictable performance without resource contention, offering a robust platform for multi-GPU processing requirements.

tagline: A dedicated multi-GPU instance featuring four accelerators and local SSD storage for parallel computing and deep learning workloads.

Equipped with four NVIDIA P100 GPUs providing 64 GB of total VRAM.
Includes 240 GB of system memory and a 1889 GB local SSD.

Optimized for deep learning, scientific simulations, and GPU-accelerated databases.
